RummyPulse - Smart Rummy Game Analytics & Management Android App with Firebase integration, Google Sign-In authentication, expandable monthly reports, point value analytics, and real-time GST calculations. Features professional dark theme UI, automated CI/CD pipeline, and comprehensive player score tracking.

A Python-based multiplayer Indian Rummy game with support for AI opponents and LAN play. Implements data structures like linked lists, stacks, queues, hashmaps, and graphs to ensure efficient gameplay and intelligent AI decisions.

repos.description: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.
🐙 Guides, papers, lessons, notebooks and resources for prompt engineering, context engineering, RAG, and AI Agents.
Private control plane for AI agents
